title: Device Home Screen - Full Support After Launch Date When LM Version Meets or Exceeds Required
scenario: Verify full support is shown on the Device Home Screen after the device's launch date when the installed LM version meets or exceeds the required version.
steps: Launch the app and pair with headset.
Ensure headset is ON and properly connected.
expected: Connection status icon shows a green dot. Full support is shown on the Device Home Screen after the device's launch date when the installed LM version meets or exceeds the required version.
